theme: 一家钥匙铺的胚钥匙墙和黄铜圆牌，为什么最不起眼的 everyday object 反而最容易暴露一个人的生活半径

items.source: 01_整面胚钥匙墙和不同形状的金属齿纹.png
items.title: 整面胚钥匙墙和不同形状的金属齿纹
items.description: 一整面钥匙胚挂起来，会让最普通的 everyday object 突然有了职业剧照感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a full wall of blank keys with varied metal tooth shapes in a key shop, industrial everyday beauty, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_黄铜圆牌堆在工作台边等着刻字.png
items.title: 黄铜圆牌堆在工作台边等着刻字
items.description: 圆牌还没刻字时最能让人想象背后的门、宠物和生活路线。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, brass round tags piled on the edge of a key-cutting workbench awaiting engraving, tactile urban everyday scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_钥匙师傅手里捏着刚配好的门禁钥匙.png
items.title: 钥匙师傅手里捏着刚配好的门禁钥匙
items.description: 刚配好的那一瞬间，像把一个人的生活半径重新复制了一遍。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, locksmith holding a freshly copied access key, close-up on worn hands and metal detail, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_打磨机旁落着细细的金属碎屑.png
items.title: 打磨机旁落着细细的金属碎屑
items.description: 碎屑比成品更像真实职业现场，也让这套图有了城市灰尘感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, fine metal shavings beside a key-cutting grinder, gritty realistic workshop detail, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_挂满钥匙圈和门禁扣的小铁网.png
items.title: 挂满钥匙圈和门禁扣的小铁网
items.description: 钥匙圈和门禁扣挂满的时候，会让人立刻想到不同租房、办公室和车位生活。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, small metal mesh covered with key rings and access fobs in a locksmith shop, dense urban utility aesthetic, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_玻璃柜里分层放着家门车库和信箱钥匙.png
items.title: 玻璃柜里分层放着家门车库和信箱钥匙
items.description: 不同用途的钥匙分层摆着，本身就是一个城市角色目录。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, layered key display in a glass case showing house, garage, and mailbox keys, categorized everyday objects, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_师傅在老式机器前对准钥匙齿口.png
items.title: 师傅在老式机器前对准钥匙齿口
items.description: 老式机器对准齿口的动作，会让整个铺子比想象中更像一种技术手艺。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, locksmith aligning a key blank in an old key cutting machine, skilled work-surface realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_傍晚灯箱下亮起来的一排黄铜门牌.png
items.title: 傍晚灯箱下亮起来的一排黄铜门牌
items.description: 傍晚亮起来的黄铜门牌，很像许多人一天生活半径的集合缩影。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a row of brass door tags glowing under evening shop light, warm urban street mood, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_塑料篮里混放着旧钥匙和待配胚钥匙.png
items.title: 塑料篮里混放着旧钥匙和待配胚钥匙
items.description: 旧钥匙和新胚钥匙混在一起，最像城市里不断更换的居住关系。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, old used keys mixed with blank key stock in a plastic basket, lived-in city utility atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_客户挑选黄铜圆牌时摊开的掌心.png
items.title: 客户挑选黄铜圆牌时摊开的掌心
items.description: 摊开的掌心和几块圆牌，会让这组图第一次出现很具体的个人生活感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, customer palm selecting brass round tags on a counter, intimate everyday decision moment, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_工作台角落挂着公寓车位和储物柜钥匙.png
items.title: 工作台角落挂着公寓车位和储物柜钥匙
items.description: 公寓、车位、储物柜这些钥匙放在一起，就像一座城市的成年人生存切面。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, apartment, parking, and storage keys hanging at the corner of a locksmith workbench, urban adult life slice, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_卷帘门快拉下前师傅整理好最后一排钥匙胚.png
items.title: 卷帘门快拉下前师傅整理好最后一排钥匙胚
items.description: 关店前整理最后一排钥匙胚的动作，很适合做这组日常职业图的收尾。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, locksmith organizing the final row of key blanks before closing the rolling shutter, reflective end-of-day workshop scene, no logos, no readable text.
